name: Ford Motor Company
description: Ford Motor Company is a global American automaker headquartered in Dearborn, Michigan, that designs, manufactures, markets, and services a full line of Ford trucks, utility vehicles, and cars, as well as Lincoln luxury vehicles. Founded by Henry Ford in 1903, the company is a leader in the automotive industry's transition toward electrification and autonomous driving. Ford is committed to delivering innovative mobility solutions through its Ford+ plan, focusing on electric vehicles, software-defined platforms, and enhanced customer experiences across its Ford Blue, Ford Model e, and Ford Pro business segments.

investment_theses.company_type: Automotive / EV Battery Plant Development in US
